# WebForTrades

> WebForTrades is a UK web design agency that builds professional websites exclusively
> for tradespeople — plumbers, electricians, builders, roofers, landscapers, plasterers,
> decorators, bricklayers, joiners, and gas engineers. Founded by Julius Prodan.

## What We Do

We build a free demo website first. You see it live on your phone before paying anything.
Only pay if you love it. One-off pricing, no contracts, no annual fees.

- [Starter — £300](https://www.webfortradesuk.co.uk/#pricing): Single-page site with quote form, .co.uk domain, free hosting, mobile optimised, basic local SEO.
- [Professional — £500](https://www.webfortradesuk.co.uk/#pricing): 5-page site (Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Quote), full on-page SEO, Google Maps and reviews integration, ongoing support.
- [Premium — £800](https://www.webfortradesuk.co.uk/#pricing): Everything in Professional plus individual service pages, local area landing pages, advanced SEO, priority support.

## Key Facts

- 100+ websites built for UK tradespeople (as of 2026)
- Free demo delivered within 48 hours of filling in the form
- No upfront payment — pay only when satisfied
- All plans include free hosting with no annual renewal fees
- No contracts, no retainers, no lock-in
- Serving all trade types across the United Kingdom

## Common Questions

**Do you pay anything upfront?** Nothing. We build your demo first, you see it live on your phone, and only pay if you want to keep it. No deposits, no risk.

**How long does it take?** Your demo is ready within 48 hours of filling in the form. Not weeks.

**Will my site show up on Google?** Yes. Every site we build is SEO optimised from day one and submitted to Google Search Console.

**Am I tied to a contract?** No contracts, no retainers, no lock-in. You pay once and that is it.

**What happens to hosting after the first year?** Hosting is included in your one-off payment with no annual renewal fees. Your site stays live as long as you want it.
